markdownRemark.html:
A collection of interesting things I’ve discovered this month:

  • Spectre.Console
  • online integer tools
  • migueldeicaza/gui.cs
  • khellang/Scrutor
  • JonPSmith/NetCore.AutoRegisterDi
  • Inversion Of Control, Single Responsibility Principle and Nikola’s laws of dependency injection
  • Ocelot
  • Channel 9 - C# 9 Language Features
  • Dependency injection in ASP.NET Core
  • ardalis/ApiEndpoints
  • POSHGUI - UIs for PowerShell
  • Elegant Themes - WordPress themes and visual editor
  • C-sharp-console-gui-framework
  • Siteground Wordpress Hosting
  • Moq - how to mock a protected method of an internal class with no parameter-less constructor
  • PCF Gallery
  • .NET Core on Azure App Service Dashboard
  • Fully documented source code for Elite on the BBC Micro
  • Writage - Markdown plugin for Microsoft Word
  • lunr-core - A port of lunr.js to .NET Core. “Lunr-core is suitable for small applications that require a simple search engine but without the overhead of a full-scale search engine such as Lucene.”
  • Bootstrap logging with Serilog + ASP.NET Core
  • Printing PDFs in Blazor
  • Adding a little Swagger to OData
  • Detecting duplicate routes in ASP.NET Core
  • Analyze syslog messages with Seq
  • Creating a custom endpoint visualization graph
  • Serilog Best Practices
  • Handling Web API Exceptions with ProblemDetails middleware
  • Beginners Guide to Programming using BBC BASIC
  • Using Alba for Integration Testing ASP.Net Core Web Services
  • Adding a git commit hash and Azure DevOps Build Number and Build ID to an ASP.NET website
  • Usborne coding books for a new generation
  • [https://arlanblogs.alvarnet.com/adding-a-root-domain-to-azure-cdn-endpoint/](Adding a Root Domain to Azure CDN endpoint)#
  • Messier Catalogue: the complete list
  • C# 8.0 nullable references: non-nullable is the new default
  • Nushell
  • Angular 9’s Best Hidden Feature: Strict Template Checking
  • Garbage Collection at Food Courts
  • Headless Recorder
  • Little Known ASP.NET Core Features - HTTP Trailers
  • Running a Kanban Standup Meeting
  • Approval Testing your Open API/Swagger Documents
  • Flexbox Defense
  • MDX - “MDX is an authorable format that lets you seamlessly write JSX in your Markdown documents”
  • Accessibility Insights
  • Dotnet-Boxed/Framework/blob/master/.editorconfig
